patches.value: Android、.NET 与 ELF 样本的静态反编译和资源检查工具参考，默认处理只读副本并把输出写入独立目录。
Static decompilation and resource-inspection reference for Android, .NET, and ELF samples using read-only copies and dedicated output directories by default.

name.zh: JADX 反编译 APK 副本
name.en: Decompile an APK Copy with JADX

description.zh: 先记录 APK 哈希，再把 Java 反编译结果写入独立目录，并只搜索固定 marker 与 URL 线索。
description.en: Record the APK hash, write Java decompilation output to a dedicated directory, and search only for a fixed marker and URL evidence.

value.command:
apktool decode --force --output ./apktool-output app.apk
find ./apktool-output -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -100

description.zh: 只解码清单、资源和 Smali 到新目录，不在分析阶段重打包、签名或覆盖原始 APK。
description.en: Decode the manifest, resources, and Smali into a new directory without rebuilding, signing, or overwriting the original APK during analysis.

value.command:
ilspycmd --project --outputdir ./ilspy-output assembly.dll
find ./ilspy-output -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -100

description.zh: 把程序集反编译为独立 C# 项目目录，并保留原始 DLL 哈希、目标框架和依赖信息用于复核。
description.en: Decompile an assembly into a separate C# project directory and retain the original DLL hash, target framework, and dependency information for review.

name.en: Inspect ELF Headers, Symbols, and Disassembly

description.zh: 将 ELF 头、程序段、节、动态符号和反汇编分别保存为文本工件，不执行样本。
description.en: Save ELF headers, program segments, sections, dynamic symbols, and disassembly as separate text artifacts without executing the sample.

description.zh: 提取长度至少六字节的可打印字符串，再用固定检索词定位线索；字符串本身不能证明控制流或敏感行为。
description.en: Extract printable strings of at least six bytes and search fixed evidence terms, treating strings as leads rather than proof of control flow or sensitive behavior.

patches.value: 二进制反调试观察、可逆脱壳、Ghidra 无头分析和 Frida 实验 Hook 的验证流程，强调样本副本与证据工件。
Validation workflows for observing anti-debug behavior, reversible unpacking, Ghidra headless analysis, and Frida lab hooks with sample copies and evidence artifacts.

name.zh: 观察 ptrace 反调试调用

value.command: gdb -q -batch -ex 'set pagination off' -ex 'catch syscall ptrace' -ex run -ex 'info registers' -ex bt --args ./sample.bin

description.zh: 在样本副本上捕获 ptrace 系统调用并保存寄存器与栈，不篡改返回值；是否属于反调试还需结合后续分支确认。
description.en: Catch ptrace calls on a sample copy and preserve registers and the stack without changing return values, confirming anti-debug behavior only from subsequent control flow.

name.zh: 验证并解压 UPX 样本副本
name.en: Validate and Unpack a UPX Sample Copy

description.zh: 先验证 UPX 格式，再把解压结果写入新文件并记录前后哈希，不修改原始样本。
description.en: Validate the UPX format before writing decompressed output to a new file and recording both hashes without modifying the original sample.

name.zh: Ghidra 无头分析单一样本
name.en: Run Ghidra Headless Analysis on One Sample

description.zh: 对单一样本运行有时间上限的无头分析并删除临时项目；需要保留结果时去掉 `-deleteProject` 并归档项目目录。
description.en: Run time-bounded headless analysis for one sample and remove the temporary project, omitting -deleteProject only when the project directory must be archived.

name.zh: Frida Android 生命周期日志 Hook
name.en: Log an Android Lifecycle Call with Frida

description.zh: 在自有实验应用启动时记录 Activity.onResume 调用并显式调用原实现，不修改返回数据、认证状态或应用持久化内容。
description.en: Log Activity.onResume calls while launching an owned lab application and explicitly invoke the original implementation without changing returned data, authentication state, or persistent content.

patches.value: Ghidra 图形界面与无头模式的静态分析参考，覆盖项目导入、限时分析、脚本输出和可复核的字符串/函数导航。
Ghidra static-analysis reference for GUI and headless workflows covering project import, time-bounded analysis, scripted output, and reviewable string and function navigation.

description.zh: 启动本地 Ghidra 项目管理器，导入前记录样本哈希并为每个案件使用独立项目目录。
description.en: Launch the local Ghidra project manager, record the sample hash before import, and use a separate project directory for each case.

name.en: Headless Import with an Analysis Timeout

description.zh: 把单一样本导入独立项目并设置每文件分析时限，保留控制台日志和项目目录用于复核。
description.en: Import one sample into a dedicated project with a per-file analysis timeout and retain console logs and the project directory for review.

name.zh: 运行受控 Ghidra 脚本

description.zh: 仅对已导入样本运行版本控制中的 ListFunctions.java，并把函数清单作为分析工件保存。
description.en: Run the version-controlled ListFunctions.java script only against an imported sample and preserve the function inventory as an analysis artifact.

value.command:
Window -> Defined Strings
Search -> For Strings
Window -> Function Graph
Help -> Key Bindings

description.zh: 从 Defined Strings、字符串搜索和 Function Graph 建立可复核导航点，并在 Key Bindings 中确认当前版本快捷键。
description.en: Establish reviewable navigation points through Defined Strings, string search, and Function Graph, confirming shortcuts in Key Bindings for the installed version.

patches.value: radare2 静态检查、字符串与交叉引用、可逆副本补丁、调试和可视化命令参考，所有写操作限定在样本副本。
radare2 reference for static inspection, strings and cross-references, reversible copy patching, debugging, and visual analysis with every write restricted to a sample copy.

name.zh: 自动分析并输出函数清单
name.en: Analyze and Export a Function Inventory

description.zh: 以只读模式运行自动分析并把函数清单写入工件文件，不进入交互调试或修改样本。
description.en: Run automatic analysis in read-only mode and export the function inventory to an artifact without entering a debugger or modifying the sample.

description.zh: 分析后输出 main 函数反汇编；符号不存在时先查看函数清单并使用实际地址或函数名。
description.en: Export main-function disassembly after analysis, consulting the function inventory for an actual address or symbol when main is unavailable.

description.zh: 导出全部字符串并用固定词检索线索，后续通过交叉引用确认字符串是否进入可达代码路径。
description.en: Export all strings and search fixed evidence terms, then confirm through cross-references whether a string reaches executable code.

description.zh: 定位固定 marker 字符串并查询其代码交叉引用；名称未生成时使用字符串地址重新执行 axt。
description.en: Locate a fixed marker string and query code cross-references, rerunning axt with the string address when no generated symbol exists.

name.zh: 在副本上应用单字节补丁
name.en: Apply a One-Byte Patch to a Copy

description.zh: 先复制样本，再在明确实验偏移写入一个字节并记录前后哈希；补丁地址必须来自同一构建的分析证据。
description.en: Copy the sample before writing one byte at an explicit lab offset and record both hashes, using a patch address derived from the same build's analysis evidence.

description.zh: 只在隔离环境启动样本副本的本地调试会话，先设置断点和资源限制，再手动继续执行。
description.en: Start a local debugging session for a sample copy only in an isolated environment, setting breakpoints and resource limits before continuing execution manually.

description.zh: 进入只读自动分析后切换到可视化模式，并使用当前安装版本的 `?` 帮助确认图形视图按键。
description.en: Enter read-only automatic analysis, switch to visual mode, and use the installed version's question-mark help to confirm graph-view keys.
